Localization.Description: A user is added to a privileged domain group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added a new user {object.account.name} to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added a new user to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Added user details: {object.account.dn}
The user {subject.account.name} added a new user to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Added user details: {object.account.name} ({object.account.dn})
The user {subject.account.name} added a new user to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Added user details: {object.account.id}
